---
name: writer-en-to-zh-academic
description: translate English academic or technical prose into natural, accurate, and academically appropriate Chinese while preserving structure and source meaning.
---

Use this skill inside `writer` when the source text is English and the target should be formal Chinese.

Before writing, read [references/prompt.md](references/prompt.md).

Core rules:

- preserve meaning before optimizing fluency
- keep formatting and structure stable
- use natural academic Chinese rather than literal English syntax
- keep terminology consistent

Output:

- return the Chinese translation
- do not add explanatory digressions unless requested
